other_observers: none; Original finder and photographer is Tim Murray.
specific_location: 37 degrees 48 min 29.75 sec N, 107 degrees 38 min 12.23 sec W.
description: Boreal Owl, nest record 2009.  Two fledged juvenile Boreal Owls, observation and photo by Tim Murray, July 16 or 17, 2009.   Location of owls in photo, 37 degrees 48 min 29.75 sec N, 107 degrees 38 min 12.23 sec W.   Near the upper elevation end of County Road 20, se of Silverton, Colorado. 11,360 feet elevation.   Record and photo by Tim Murray, Aspen, Colorado; submitted via personal communication with David H. Johnson, Director - Global Owl Project.Behaviors: see photoCall: visual observation and photographPlumage: fledged juveniles
